name: Publish private test release
on:
  push:
    branches:
      # Put the current branch name here: 
      - 'dev' 

jobs:
  publish-tauri:
    permissions:
      contents: write
    strategy:
      fail-fast: false
      matrix:
        settings:
          - platform: 'demo' # window-latest equivalent.

    runs-on: ${{ matrix.settings.platform }}

    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          lfs: true
          fetch-depth: 0

      - name: Install Rust
        uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@stable

      - name: Setup node
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: 20 # lts/*

      - name: install frontend dependencies
        run: npm install # Change this to npm, pnpm or bun depending on which one you use.

      - name: Build and upload a GitHub release
        uses: tauri-apps/tauri-action@v0
        env:
          GITHUB_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.PAT_FOR_PUBLIC_REPO }} 
          TAURI_PRIVATE_KEY: ${{ secrets.TAURI_PRIVATE_KEY }}
          TAURI_KEY_PASSWORD: ${{ secrets.TAURI_KEY_PASSWORD }}
        with:
          tagName: v_test___VERSION__
          releaseName: "v_test___VERSION__" 
          releaseBody: |
            Release notes: tba.
          releaseDraft: false 
          prerelease: false
          includeUpdaterJson: true # 
          # Put the current branch name here:
          releaseCommitish: 'dev'
